TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 溪口淒美的故事
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Losing Yagu 與 Loba Umaw Tanga Watan ﹙因為 Loba 父母已不在世﹚告訴他的姪女說:Loba ,Losing ,Losing Losing ,Tanga Watan Loba 已被上部落的Losing Loba Losing, Topaw Nokan 與下部落的 Batu Nomin Batu Cyang Tanga Watan ﹙ Loba ,Topaw Nokan (b'nux cingan)來解決,( ,當Tanga Watan Batu Rukul , Hola Turay ,Batu Rukul Topaw Nokan Tanga Watan Batu Nomin gaga ,Tanga Watan Losing Yagu ,在Tayal gaga, gaga gaga, bnux cingan,敲鐘的平台.
S.PHON: == los~ɕiŋ jaɣu * loβa umaw taŋa watan *** loβa **************:loβa ,los~ɕiŋ ,los~ɕiŋ los~ɕiŋ ,taŋa watan loβa ******los~ɕiŋ loβa los~ɕiŋ, topaw nokan ***** βatu nomin βatu ʦ~ʨjaŋ taŋa watan * loβa ,topaw nokan (βʔnux ʦ~ʨiŋan)***,( ,*taŋa watan βatu rukul , ħola turaj ,βatu rukul topaw nokan taŋa watan βatu nomin ɣaɣa ,taŋa watan los~ɕiŋ jaɣu ,*tajal ɣaɣa, ɣaɣa ɣaɣa, βnux ʦ~ʨiŋan,*****.
S.FORM: == Losing Yagu 與 Loba Umaw Tanga Watan ﹙因為 Loba 父母已不在世﹚告訴他的姪女說:Loba ,Losing ,Losing Losing ,Tanga Watan Loba 已被上部落的Losing Loba Losing, Topaw Nokan 與下部落的 Batu Nomin Batu Cyang Tanga Watan ﹙ Loba ,Topaw Nokan (b'nux cingan)來解決,( ,當Tanga Watan Batu Rukul , Hola Turay ,Batu Rukul Topaw Nokan Tanga Watan Batu Nomin gaga ,Tanga Watan Losing Yagu ,在Tayal gaga, gaga gaga, bnux cingan,敲鐘的平台.
S.PHON: == los~ɕiŋ jaɣu * loβa umaw taŋa watan *** loβa **************:loβa ,los~ɕiŋ ,los~ɕiŋ los~ɕiŋ ,taŋa watan loβa ******los~ɕiŋ loβa los~ɕiŋ, topaw nokan ***** βatu nomin βatu ʦ~ʨjaŋ taŋa watan * loβa ,topaw nokan (βʔnux ʦ~ʨiŋan)***,( ,*taŋa watan βatu rukul , ħola turaj ,βatu rukul topaw nokan taŋa watan βatu nomin ɣaɣa ,taŋa watan los~ɕiŋ jaɣu ,*tajal ɣaɣa, ɣaɣa ɣaɣa, βnux ʦ~ʨiŋan,*****.
